```python
import yfinance as yf

# 获取Airbnb公司信息
abnb = yf.Ticker("ABNB")
info = abnb.info

# 查找CFO信息
print("=== Searching for CFO ===")
for k, v in info.items():
    if isinstance(v, str) and ('cfo' in v.lower() or 'chief financial' in v.lower()):
        print(f"{k}: {v}")

# 查找高管列表
print("\n=== Company Officers ===")
officers = info.get('companyOfficers', [])
for officer in officers[:10]:
    name = officer.get('name', '')
    title = officer.get('title', '')
    if name and title:
        print(f"{name}: {title}")
        if 'cfo' in title.lower() or 'chief financial' in title.lower():
            print(f"  >>> CFO: {name}")
```

```
